Commander Buster Crabb vanished in 1956 while covertly inspecting a Soviet cruiser in Portsmouth. Was he taken prisoner or killed? Narrated by Robert Powell.

The murder in 1943 of Sir Harry Oakes in the Bahamas, where the Duke of Windsor was governor at the time, saw him implicated in influencing the outcome of his murder trial. Ep2: The Duke of Windsor
Fresh from invading Czechoslovakia, Hitler now turned to his next target: Poland. Hitler saw this vast country as ripe for German expansion - and taking him to the borders of the Soviet Union. Ep3
World War Two would herald gigantic advances in military strategy. However, as far as the sea was concerned, the perils of the deep remained unchallenged: The Killer Wolf Packs.
...Bulge. Get a soldier's-eye view of the frozen front lines in the Ardennes, and learn how American troops thwarted the German's massive surprise offensive.
Fast patrol boats armed with torpedoes and machine guns were the marine raiders of World War II; this programme looks at some of their most spectacular raids. Ep10: Fast Attack Boats

programmes.show_name: Jets of the Fleet Air Arm
programmes.show_description: All nine jet types have flown with the Fleet Air Arm - using previously unseen material, their story is told through the memories of the men who flew these aircraft during the last 50 years.
We uncover the true story of the spectacular escape from the Auschwitz camp in 1944 by Rudolf Vrba and Alfred Wetzler, two young Slovak Jews.

programmes.show_name: Living in the Shadow of WWII
programmes.show_description: Every combatant nation during WWII introduces a form of rationing as they attempt to maintain a reliable food supply - we look at ingenious ways in which people put food on the table. Ep1: Daily Bread
...Were You? In March 1978, wild weather off France hit the Amoco Cadiz, causing the worst oil spill at sea of its time - sadly, it was not an isolated incident, as the Exxon Valdez disaster shows.

A look at the aspects of the war from 1916-1917 - the battles on both fronts, the situation faced by the forces of the numerous combatants and the growing desperation of both sides of the conflict. E6
The many variants of the A-1 Skyraider single piston-engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air to ground attack role in Vietnam and earned quite the reputation. S2 E4
We've reached the top 25 in our countdown of unsolved mysteries including a famous outlaw who escaped his grave, an infamous gangland massacre never solved, and a secret mob assassin revealed. E6

Drama series about a detective who suffers a near-fatal car crash and wakes up in what seems to be 1973, where his 21st-century attitudes make him a fish out of water. Starring John Simm. S1 E1
